input.draft: Short feedback loops are good. They catch problems faster. Teams move faster.

expected.final: Short feedback loops catch problems faster and let teams iterate with confidence — small wins that compound into meaningful velocity.

input.draft: Walking meetings are better than sitting. People focus more. Ideas flow.

expected.final: Walking meetings replace stale rooms with movement and fresh air; they tend to be shorter, more focused, and surface ideas that wouldn't appear in a video grid.
